bidder: Servier S.A.S. (via Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC and Servier Detroit Inc.)
L1_headline: + DAWN – Preliminary SC 14D-9 filed for Servier acquisition. | 03/06/26
L2_brief: Day One Biopharmaceuticals filed a preliminary SC 14D-9 communication in connection with its proposed acquisition by Servier S.A.S. pursuant to a Merger Agreement dated March 6, 2026. The deal structure involves a tender offer by Servier's subsidiary (Servier Detroit Inc.) followed by a back-end merger. Specific offer price, premium, and board recommendation details are not included in this preliminary communication filing and will be disclosed in the formal Schedule TO and Schedule 14D-9 filings once the tender offer commences.

L3_detailed.board_recommendation: UNABLE TO DETERMINE — This is a preliminary communication only. The formal Solicitation/Recommendation Statement on Schedule 14D-9 has not yet been filed.
L3_detailed.fairness_opinion: Not disclosed in this preliminary communication
L3_detailed.background_of_transaction: An Agreement and Plan of Merger was entered into on March 6, 2026, among Day One Biopharmaceuticals, Servier S.A.S. (a French société par actions simplifiée), Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC (a Delaware LLC and indirect wholly owned subsidiary of Servier), and Servier Detroit Inc. (a Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC). The deal is structured as a tender offer followed by a back-end merger. No further negotiation history, competing bidder details, or timeline of discussions is provided in this preliminary filing.
